summary: The batch exhibits a high coverage of attribute values, with only a few missing combinations. There are instances of near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented modes, particularly in emotional and fragmented styles.
recommendations: Encourage more diverse emotional expressions to reduce overrepresentation of emotional style.
Introduce more scenarios involving edge cases, such as rare card issues or unique transaction problems.
Ensure a wider variety of intents are represented, particularly those that are less common.
